amount_to_increment_by_negative_to_decre: Amount to increment by (negative to decrement)
cache_a_computed_value_in_redis_with_a: Cache a computed value in Redis with a TTL and read it back on later runs.
connect_to_any_redis_instance_to_perform: Connect to any Redis instance to perform key-value, hash, list, and utility operations via a direct connection.
hash_field_name_hset_hget_hdel_operation: Hash field name (HSET, HGET, HDEL operations)
hash_field_value_pairs_keyed_by_field_na: Hash field-value pairs keyed by field name (HGETALL operation)
list_elements_in_the_specified_range_lra: List elements in the specified range (LRANGE operation)
list_of_keys_matching_the_pattern_keys_o: List of keys matching the pattern (Keys operation)
number_of_fields_in_the_hash_hgetall_ope: Number of fields in the hash (HGETALL operation)
number_of_items_found_keys_lrange_operat: Number of items found (Keys, LRANGE operations)
operation_result_set_hset_expire_persist: Operation result (Set, HSET, EXPIRE, PERSIST, Command operations)
push_jobs_onto_a_redis_list_and_pop: Push jobs onto a Redis list and pop them for processing in order.
remaining_ttl_in_seconds_positive_intege: Remaining TTL in seconds. Positive integer if TTL set, -1 if no expiration, -2 if key does not exist.
retrieved_value_get_hget_lpop_rpop_strin: Retrieved value (Get, HGET, LPOP, RPOP: string or null) or new value after increment (INCR, INCRBY: number)
store_and_refresh_session_context_in_a_r: Store and refresh session context in a Redis hash keyed by token.
the_command_that_was_executed_command_op: The command that was executed (Command operation)
the_pattern_used_to_match_keys_keys_oper: The pattern used to match keys (Keys operation)
track_per_key_request_counts_in_redis_wi: Track per-key request counts in Redis with a sliding expiry to enforce limits.
whether_the_key_exists_true_or_not_false: Whether the key exists (true) or not (false) (EXISTS operation)
whether_the_key_was_set_true_or_already: Whether the key was set (true) or already existed (false) (SETNX operation)
